title: Provide structured data to ewing-trial-finder
context: Backlog/future (unscheduled). This project structures eligibility; the separate HIGH-risk ewing-trial-finder project owns matching. This handoff provides validated structured data via a documented interface while preserving the strict boundary: we never assert recruiting status as guidance, and current status is always deferred to the live registry. Not-advice + not-eligibility-determination labels are preserved across the handoff.
objective: Provide validated structured eligibility data to the ewing-trial-finder project via a documented interface that never asserts recruiting status as guidance.
acceptanceCriteria: Validated structured eligibility data is provided to ewing-trial-finder via a documented interface.
Recruiting status is never asserted as guidance; current status is deferred to the live registry link.
Not-advice + not-eligibility-determination labels and provenance are preserved across the handoff.
The scope boundary (we structure; finder matches) is documented and respected.
